First, the way we think can stop us from looking for more. When we first learn a way to do something, we may think we have the whole picture. That can make us feel sure, but it can also make us miss other ways that are there. If we keep only the box, we may not see a new way that could be better or safer.

Second, when we say that the box is full, we may tell others that we know all about it. That can make them feel that they do not need to ask for help.
